decision_commentary: All five required fields present: project_name='Casa Vista — Patricia Reyes', source_channel='professional_contact', raw_message (verbatim Spanish inbound), initial_assessment, recommended_action='proceed to discovery'. Completeness 5: source, channel, raw message, classification, and initial assessment all present. Accuracy 5: classified as residential_in_development (correct — client owns lot in fraccionamiento privado); legitimacy assessment defensible with HOA context, program detail, and budget range. Clarity 5: Marcela can decide approve/reject in under 30 seconds — strong candidate language, specific program details, HOA awareness noted. State sync 3: simulated run, no live Asana verification. Timing 5: summary created promptly after lead creation in same session. Decision readiness 5: explicit recommended_action='proceed to discovery' with substantive rationale. No auto-fail conditions triggered.
